positive: A vibrant, retro-futuristic portrait of a woman piloting a chrome-plated airship over a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. Style: Synthwave aesthetic, vaporwave colors (magenta, cyan, electric blue), dramatic lighting, highly detailed illustration, 1980s comic book feel.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural grass, soft focus, muted colors
